cues.text: 好久不見！最近好嗎？
cues.tr: Long time no see! How have you been?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 還不錯呀！我正在計劃我的假期。你呢？
cues.tr: Not too bad! I'm planning my vacation. How about you?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我也在想假期要怎麼安排。我想去海邊，你呢？
cues.tr: I'm also thinking about my vacation. I want to go to the beach.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我想去山上。山上的空氣很好。
cues.tr: I want to go to the mountains. The air in the mountains is good.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 海邊也很漂亮，可以游泳和曬太陽。
cues.tr: The beach is also very beautiful. You can swim and sunbathe there.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 那聽起來不錯！你準備去哪個海邊？
cues.tr: That sounds nice! Which beach are you going to?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我想去三亞，聽說那裡很美。
cues.tr: I want to go to Sanya. I heard it is very beautiful.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我去過三亞，那裡的海水很藍，沙灘很乾淨。
cues.tr: I've been to Sanya. The water is blue and the beaches are clean.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 真的嗎？那太好了！你在三亞玩了什麼？
cues.tr: Really? That's great! What did you do in Sanya?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我在那裡游泳、曬太陽，還吃了很多海鮮。
cues.tr: I swam, sunbathed and ate a lot of seafood.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 聽起來很開心！我最喜歡吃海鮮了。
cues.tr: Sounds like fun! I love eating seafood.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是啊，假期就應該放鬆，做自己喜歡的事。
cues.tr: Yes, you should relax and do what you like on vacation.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 沒錯！那你去山上打算做什麼呢？
cues.tr: That's right! What are you going to do in the mountains?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我打算爬山、看日出，還要拍很多照片。
cues.tr: I'm going to climb mountains, watch the sunrise and take lots of pictures.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 聽起來很棒！你準備什麼時候去？
cues.tr: Sounds great! When are you going to go?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我打算下個月去。你呢？
cues.tr: I plan to go next month. What about you?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我也是下個月，你去幾天？
cues.tr: I'm also going next month. How many days are you going?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 應該是一個星期。
cues.tr: It should be a week.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 可能我們可以一起計劃一下。
cues.tr: Maybe we can plan it together.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 好啊！我們可以互相分享我們的旅行經驗。
cues.tr: Sure! We can share our travel experiences with each other.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那就這麼說定了！
cues.tr: That's settled then!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 一定會很有趣的。
cues.tr: It's going to be fun.
cues.speaker: B
